paragraphs: A small creative studio built around direction, design, and delivery.
Leo directs and produces. Amanda builds brands and products. Nikita keeps everything moving. Noodle supervises.
We work with founders and brands who know what they want to say but need the right team to say it.

cta.headline: ALL GREAT IDEAS START WITH HELLO
cta.subheadline: Let's get your story out there!
